channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gul Plaza Fire Inquiry Report Submitted to Sindh Government
item.description: The report on the deadly Gul Plaza fire, which occurred on January 17 and claimed over 70 lives, was officially handed over to the Sindh government. Justice Agha Faisal, the head of the Gul Plaza Judi...

item.title: Rising Number of Over-55s at Risk of Homelessness Due to Housing Crisis
item.description: The number of older people in the UK facing homelessness has risen sharply, with many struggling to find affordable housing as rents soar and housing benefits remain frozen. Richard Hewett, a 59-year-...

item.title: Trump declares US success following temporary ceasefire agreement with Iran
item.description: On 8 April 2026, President Donald Trump claimed the United States had achieved a 'total and complete victory' following a two-week ceasefire agreement with Iran. Speaking to AFP, Trump described the d...

item.title: Zanzibar Leaders Commemorate Karume’s Legacy 54 Years After Assassination
item.description: In Zanzibar, President Samia Suluhu Hassan and Zanzibar President Hussein Mwinyi joined hundreds of citizens and Karume family members to remember the late Abeid Amani Karume, 54 years after his assas...

item.title: Tinubu expands PiCNG mandate to cover electric vehicles alongside CNG
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don give go-ahead make the Presidential Initiative on Compressed Natural Gas (PiCNG) dey include electric vehicles (EVs). With this new approval, dem don rename am Presidential I...

item.title: Life and Challenges in Zanskar Amid Climate Change and Modernisation
item.description: The article recounts the history and ongoing transformations in Zanskar, a remote district in Ladakh. In 1979, Tashi Tundup, a young postal worker, organised the first postal service in the valley, ov...

item.title: Zimbabwean Official Alleges Cooperation With South Africa to Target Critics of President Mnangagwa
item.description: Andrew Pasinawako, head of the Zimbabwe Anti-Presidential Criticism Team, a pro-Zanu PF group, has publicly claimed that the Zimbabwean government is cooperating with South African authorities to moni...

item.title: Premier Wab Kinew signals openness to another fuel tax reduction amid rising gas prices
item.description: Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew has hinted that his government may consider cutting the provincial fuel tax again as gasoline prices continue to rise. During a question period in the legislature, Kinew une...

item.title: Scottie Barnes helps Raptors secure a crucial 121-95 win against Miami Heat
item.description: In a crucial match for playoff positioning, Scottie Barnes led the Toronto Raptors to a 121-95 victory over the Miami Heat on April 7, 2026. Barnes scored 25 points and grabbed eight rebounds while di...

item.title: Scottie Barnes leads Raptors to decisive win over Heat to secure playoff positioning
item.description: Scottie Barnes delivered an impressive performance with 25 points, eight rebounds, and five assists as the Toronto Raptors dominated the Miami Heat 121–95 on Tuesday. The victory strengthened Toronto’...

item.title: AIM and University of Houston partner for new double degree to enhance Filipino workforce skills
item.description: The Asian Institute of Management (AIM) and the University of Houston in Texas have formally launched a new double degree program designed to address the widening skills gap in the Philippines. This c...

item.title: Researchers Develop RNA Barcode Technique to Map Brain Connectivity
item.description: Researchers at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign have created a novel method to map brain connectivity using RNA barcodes. This approach, called Connectome-seq, assigns unique RNA barcode...

item.title: US and Iran agree on provisional ceasefire; Lebanon excluded from truce
item.description: The United States and Iran have reached a conditional two-week ceasefire just an hour before former President Donald Trump's deadline to escalate military action against Iran. Tehran has confirmed it ...

item.title: NASA Releases First High-Resolution Photos from Artemis II Moon Flyby
item.description: NASA has shared the first images from the Artemis II mission, capturing the far side of the moon from a distance of 6,000 to 7,000 kilometers. These high-resolution photos, taken with professional cam...

item.title: Enugu Government Suspends Daily Levies on Market Traders Without Shops
item.description: Governor Peter Ndubisi Mbah of Enugu State don announce say e don suspend the daily toll wey dey collect from petty traders wey no get proper lockup shops. This suspension dey indefinite and e dey par...

item.title: Rising fuel prices and low crop prices force Filipino farmers to halt harvests
item.description: Across different agricultural areas in the Philippines, farmers are leaving their crops unharvested because of skyrocketing fuel costs and collapsing farmgate prices. The report by ABS-CBN News highli...

item.title: Karangu Muraya Shares Birthday Chat with Woman Asking for Gifts and Relationship
item.description: Kenyan musician and philanthropist Karangu Muraya stirred online conversations after he shared a WhatsApp chat with a woman who was persistently asking him to be her boyfriend and also requesting birt...

item.title: Inquiry Commission granted additional 21 days to finalize its work
item.description: The Independent Commission of Inquiry into the October 29, 2025 incidents has been granted an additional 21 days to finalize its work, now due by April 24, 2026. This extension was approved by the gov...

item.title: Over 24,000 violators apprehended in NCR under DILG Safe Cities initiative
item.description: A total of 24,000 individuals were apprehended for violating city ordinances as part of the Department of the Interior and Local Government’s (DILG) ongoing Safe Cities campaign. The operation, spearh...

item.title: Third faction emerges in ADC, backs INEC de-recognition of David Mark-led leadership and disowns Gombe camp
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) internal crisis has worsened as a third faction loyal to the party's 2023 presidential candidate, Dumebi Kachikwu, surfaced in Abuja. This new group, made up of s...
